zh.lifeSummary: 當Adam Thurston於1561年1月22日出生在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾坎布利其時，他的父親John Thurston36歲，母親Margareta Warman26歲。他於1580年之前與Ellen Johnson在英國英格蘭賀特福爾結婚。他去世於1590年在他的家鄉享年29歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adam Thurston于1561年1月22日出生在英国英格兰坎布利其爾坎布利其时，他的父亲John Thurston36岁，母亲Margareta Warman26岁。他于1580年之前与Ellen Johnson在英国英格兰賀特福爾结婚。他去世于1590年在他的家乡享年29岁。

nameMeanings.name: Thurston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from the Anglo-Norman, Anglo-Scandinavian, and Middle English personal name Thurstan, Thorsten (Old Norse Thórsteinn, Thorsten, Anglicized as Old English Thurstān; see Thorstensen ).
habitational name from Thurston in Suffolk, so called from the genitive case of the Old Norse personal name Thóri (see Thor ) + Old English tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Tustin
meanings: English (Worcestershire, Warwickshire and Gloucestershire): variant of   Thurston  .

variants.name: Thorstensen
meanings: Norwegian and Danish: patronymic from the personal name Thorsten, a variant of Thorstein, Old Norse Thórsteinn, composed of the name of the god Thórr (see Thor ) + steinn ‘stone, rock’, hence meaning ‘altar of Thor’ or perhaps ‘hammer of Thor’.

nameMeanings.name: Adam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Adam Thurston was born on 22 January 1561, in Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Thurston, was 36 and his mother, Margareta Warman, was 26. He married Ellen Johnson before 1580, in Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom. He died in 1590, in his hometown, at the age of 29.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adam Thurston est né le 22 janvier 1561, à Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Thurston, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Margareta Warman, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Ellen Johnson avant 1580, à Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé en 1590, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 29 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adam Thurston am 22. Januar 1561 in Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Thurston 36 und seine Mutter Margareta Warman 26. Er hat vor 1580 in Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom Ellen Johnson geheiratet. Er starb 1590 im Alter von 29 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adam Thurston è nato il il 22 gennaio 1561 nel Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Thurston, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Margareta Warman, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Ellen Johnson prima del 1580, nel Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì nel 1590, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 29 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Adam Thurston(이)가 1561년 1월 22일 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 캄브리지에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Thurston(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Margareta Warman(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1580년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르에서 Ellen Johnson(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1590년 그의 고향에서 29세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adam Thurston родился 22 января 1561 г. в местности камбридж, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Thurston было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Margareta Warman, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Ellen Johnson перед 1580 г. в местности хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер в 1590 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 29 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adam Thurston nació el 22 de enero de 1561, en Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Thurston, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Margareta Warman, tenía 26 años.
